+-----------+-----------------+------------+----------------+-----------+
|   VLAN ID | IP Address      | Ports      | Port Tagging   | Proxy ARP |
+===========+=================+============+================+===========+
|       100 | 10.0.0.254/24   | Ethernet0  | untagged       | disabled  |
|           |                 | Ethernet4  | tagged         |           |
+-----------+-----------------+------------+----------------+-----------+
|       200 | 192.168.1.254/24| Ethernet8  | untagged       | disabled  |
+-----------+-----------------+------------+----------------+-----------+
